description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script executing `R --vanilla -f install.R` for all jobs. Define a single job named `build:rocker/ropensci` that uses the `rocker/ropensci` Docker image, runs in the default stage, and executes the shell commands `make install roxygen check`, then `mv ../rkeos.Rcheck rcheck`, and finally `export`. Configure the job to collect the `rcheck/` directory as an artifact after the script finishes. No additional stages, caches, or rules are specified.
